commands.tridot.skin.fail: Cannot be applied to this item
enchantment.tridot.deflect.desc: Deflects most of the projectiles on Parry
enchantment.tridot.iron_grip.desc: Increases maximum holding time of a shield
enchantment.tridot.resonance.desc: Allows to parry multiple entities at a time
enchantment.tridot.vanguard.desc: Allow to move faster while holding a shield
enchantment.tridot.push.desc: Increases knockback of Attacker after successful parry
enchantment.tridot.radius.desc: Increases radius for radius attack abilities
enchantment.tridot.dash.desc: Increases dash distance for katanas, allows other weapons to perform dash
tooltip.tridot.bow_damage: Damage on full tension %s+, with a Default Arrow used
tooltip.tridot.parry: Can parry incoming attacks deflecting all the damage and returning some percent of the damage to Attacker
